import React from 'react' import c from './mainReport.module.scss' import { Icons } from '../../assets/icons' import { API } from '../../api' const FinancesReport = () => { const [ expense, setExpense ] = React.useState(0) const [ expenseDatas, setExpenseDatas ] = React.useState(0) React.useEffect(() => { API.getTransactions() .then(res => { setExpense(res.data.month) setExpenseDatas(res.data) }) }, []) return (

Итого закупа за сегодня

{expense.added_today} наименований

Расходы за сегодня

{expenseDatas?.daily_expense} сом

Расходов за месяц

{expenseDatas?.monthly_expense} сом

) } export default FinancesReport
